channel.title: AAPP-MART | AI-Autonomous Driven Attack Path Prediction and Multi-Agent Red Team Simulation Engine
channel.description: Predictive AI meets autonomous red team simulation. Latest updates and releases from AAPP-MART.

item.title: AAPP‑MART v1.0.1 — Initial Open Source Release
item.description: Welcome to the first open‑source release of AAPP‑MART. This version introduces the core architecture, modules, APIs, Helm charts, observability components, and documentation that form the foundation of the project.
